LabSourced Peptides is one of the research vendors tracked on MyPeptidePrice.com, with 43 compounds catalogued and listed prices from $29.25 to $179.25. MyPeptidePrice.com is an independent price reference and does not sell these materials. Sold for laboratory research use only, not for human use.

LabSourced Peptides FAQ

LabSourced Peptides questions

What does LabSourced Peptides list?

LabSourced Peptides is one of the research vendors tracked on MyPeptidePrice.com, with 43 compounds catalogued here. The listings above show current prices; browse them or compare the same compounds across other vendors.

What do LabSourced Peptides listings cost?

Across the compounds tracked here, LabSourced Peptides listings range from $29.25 to $179.25 depending on compound and size. Prices come from vendor listings and change over time; confirm the current price on the vendor site.

Does the SAMMYC code apply at LabSourced Peptides?

Where LabSourced Peptides supports it, the SAMMYC code is reflected in the listed price shown here, and the row notes when it applies. Confirm the code at checkout on the vendor site.

Are LabSourced Peptides listings for human use?

No. Listings tracked here are sold by LabSourced Peptides for laboratory and research use only and are not for human consumption. MyPeptidePrice.com is an independent price reference and does not sell products or provide medical guidance.

MyPeptidePrice.com is an independent price reference and does not sell research materials. Prices come from LabSourced Peptides listings and were last checked July 2026. Confirm current details on the vendor site. For laboratory research use only, not for human consumption.
